content.query:
CREATE VIEW BI_ManufacturingOrders
-- drop view BI_ManufacturingOrders

AS

    SELECT
        MFNO AS [Manufacturing Number],
        WHST AS [Order Status],
        WHLO AS [Warehouse],
        ITNO AS [Item Number],
        PRNO AS [Product Number],
        ORTY AS [Order Type],
        CASE WHEN WHST < 80 THEN 'Open' ELSE 'Completed' END AS [Status Type],
        WOSQ AS [Reporting Number],
        RESP AS [Responsible],
        STDT AS [Start Date],
        TRY_CAST(
            LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), RPDT), 4) + '-' + 
            SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), RPDT), 5, 2) + '-' + 
            RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), RPDT), 2)
            AS DATE
        ) AS [Report Date],
        RGDT AS [Entry Date],
        ORQA AS [Order Quantity],
        RVQA AS [Received Qty],
        MAQA AS [Manufactured Quantity],
        WCLN AS [Production Line],
        RORN AS [Reference Order Number],
        RORL AS [Reference Order Line]

    FROM M3.MWOHED MW
